languages.text: "Вас ужасает мой вид, не так ли? Но когда я еще не отверг ограничения человеческого естества, династия фон Валанциус угасала, и посмотрите сейчас — протекторат процветает! Конечно, мне пришлось принести в жертву часть своей человеческой природы, но чего я добился взамен? Новые миры, новые горизонты... Я не ожидаю, что вы меня поймете, вы все же не Вольный Торговец. Ваш мир слишком мал, чтобы оценить масштабы моих завоеваний".

traits.locale_text: "Вас ужасает мой вид, не так ли? Но когда я еще не отверг ограничения человеческого естества, династия фон Валанциус угасала, и посмотрите сейчас — протекторат процветает! Конечно, мне пришлось принести в жертву часть своей человеческой природы, но чего я добился взамен? Новые миры, новые горизонты... Я не ожидаю, что вы меня поймете, вы все же не Вольный Торговец. Ваш мир слишком мал, чтобы оценить масштабы моих завоеваний".

languages.text: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."

languages.text: "Mein Äußeres macht Euch Angst, oder? Als ich den natürlichen Grenzen der Menschheit noch nicht abgeschworen hatte, welkte die Dynastie derer von Valancius dahin, aber seht sie Euch jetzt an ... das Protektorat blüht auf! Ich musste einen Teil meiner menschlichen Natur opfern, ja, aber was habe ich dafür erhalten? Neue Welten, neue Horizonte ... Ich erwarte nicht, dass Ihr das versteht. Ihr seid schließlich {mf|kein Freihändler|keine Freihändlerin}. Eure Welt ist zu klein, um das Ausmaß meiner Eroberungen zu schätzen."
languages.original_text: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."

Ihr seid schließlich {mf|kein Freihändler|keine Freihändlerin}. Eure Welt ist zu klein, um das Ausmaß meiner Eroberungen zu schätzen."

languages.text: “我的样子把你吓到了？在我尚未摒弃与生俱来的人性局限时，冯·瓦兰修斯王朝日渐衰落，但看看现在，这片属地欣欣向荣！我确实牺牲了一部分人性，但我换来了新的世界，新的疆域……我不指望你能理解，你毕竟不是行商浪人。你的世界太小，无法理解我征服大业的规模。”
languages.original_text: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."

traits.locale_text: “我的样子把你吓到了？在我尚未摒弃与生俱来的人性局限时，冯·瓦兰修斯王朝日渐衰落，但看看现在，这片属地欣欣向荣！我确实牺牲了一部分人性，但我换来了新的世界，新的疆域……我不指望你能理解，你毕竟不是行商浪人。你的世界太小，无法理解我征服大业的规模。”

languages.text: « Mon apparence vous fait horreur, n'est-ce pas ? À l'époque où je n'avais pas encore rejeté les limites innées de la condition humaine, la dynastie von Valancius s'éteignait, mais regardez-nous aujourd'hui : le protectorat est florissant ! Certes, j'ai dû sacrifier une part de mon humanité, mais qu'ai-je obtenu en retour ? De nouveaux mondes, de nouveaux horizons... Je ne m'attends pas à ce que vous compreniez. Après tout, vous n'êtes pas {mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. Votre monde est trop étriqué pour que vous soyez en mesure d'apprécier l'étendue de mes conquêtes. »
languages.original_text: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."

Certes, j'ai dû sacrifier une part de mon humanité, mais qu'ai-je obtenu en retour ? De nouveaux mondes, de nouveaux horizons... Je ne m'attends pas à ce que vous compreniez. Après tout, vous n'êtes pas {mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. Votre monde est trop étriqué pour que vous soyez en mesure d'apprécier l'étendue de mes conquêtes. »

languages.text: «Mi aspecto le horroriza, ¿verdad? Antes de que renunciara a las limitaciones innatas de la forma humana, la dinastía von Valancius estaba en declive, y sin embargo, mírenos ahora: ¡el protectorado está prosperando! He tenido que sacrificar parte de mi naturaleza humana, eso es cierto, pero ¿y lo que he ganado a cambio? Nuevos mundos, nuevos horizontes... No espero que lo comprenda; a fin de cuentas, usted no es Comerciante Independiente. Su mundo es demasiado pequeño para apreciar la magnitud de mis conquistas».
languages.original_text: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."

No espero que lo comprenda; a fin de cuentas, usted no es Comerciante Independiente. Su mundo es demasiado pequeño para apreciar la magnitud de mis conquistas».

languages.text: "Görünüşüm insanı dehşete düşürüyor, değil mi? Ben henüz insanlığın doğuştan gelen sınırlamalarından vazgeçmemişken von Valancius hanedanlığı yok oluyordu. Şimdiyse... Protektora gelişiyor! İnsan doğamın bir kısmını feda etmek zorunda kaldım ama karşılığında ne kazandım? Yeni dünyalar, yeni ufuklar... Anlamanı beklemiyorum, sonuçta sen Hür Tacir değilsin. Dünyan, benim fetihlerimin ölçeğini takdir edemeyecek kadar küçük."
languages.original_text: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."

Dünyan, benim fetihlerimin ölçeğini takdir edemeyecek kadar küçük."

languages.text: 「私の姿が恐ろしいと思われているでしょう？人間の本質的な限界を捨てていなかった頃、フォン・ヴァランシウス家は衰退していましたが、今はご覧のとおり、保護領は繁栄しています。人間としての性質の一部を犠牲にしたことはありますが、その代わりに得たものは？新しい世界、新しい視野…あなたは理解できないでしょう。あなたはローグ・トレーダーではありません。あなたの世界は私の征服の規模を理解するのに小さすぎます。」
languages.original_text: "My appearance horrifies you, doesn't it? When I had not yet renounced the innate limitations of humanity, the von Valancius dynasty was fading, but now look — the protectorate is thriving! I have had to sacrifice some of my human nature, yes, but what have I gained in return? New worlds, new horizons... I do not expect you to understand, you are not a Rogue Trader after all. Your world is too small to appreciate the scale of my conquests."
